steps.title: Identify the parallel meaning signal
steps.content: The key clue is the parallel structure not only ______ steps but also illuminate. Since "illuminate" means to reveal or clarify something, the blank needs a verb expressing how paleontologists recognize evolutionary steps.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean "identify or recognize" — the fossil helps paleontologists perceive steps in hominid evolution, parallel to illuminating the Pliocene epoch. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — yield: produce or give forth — the fossil doesn't yield steps; paleontologists perceive steps from the fossil. ✗
  • Choice B — exploit: take advantage of — this implies using steps opportunistically, not recognizing them as the passage describes. ✗
  • Choice C — discern: perceive or identify through careful study — paleontologists use fossil evidence to make out evolutionary steps, directly matching the passage. ✓
  • Choice D — prioritize: rank as more important — the passage says nothing about ranking steps; it's about recognizing them. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
